creator: h.eichmann@gmx.de
text:
Hi!

Due to the lack of free time I have to drop the maintainership of my ports.

eMovix itself seems to be dead: There was no activity since 2005.

Best regards,


Heiner

Fix: --Boundary-00=_rmrBMLOGHpWC3yG

  charset="iso 8859-15";
  name="Makefile.diff"

--Boundary-00=_rmrBMLOGHpWC3yG----XRiwQPyt67cP7s3UgyX7L7lhnRvaQJW5R15jH2wB14mcj695

--- Makefile.orig	2010-06-02 22:03:58.000000000 +0200
+++ Makefile	2010-06-02 22:04:23.000000000 +0200
@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@
 CATEGORIES=	multimedia
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/movix/eMoviX/0.9
 
-MAINTAINER=	h.eichmann@gmx.de
+MAINTAINER=	ports@freebsd.org
 COMMENT=	A mini linux distro to create bootable video CDs
 
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
